selections.name: Seeiaye
selections.reason: Consistent performer who ran a strong second last start at this track. Handles rain-affected ground well and is ready to peak at the 6f trip.

selections.name: Internal Affairs
selections.reason: Impressive first-up winner at Hawkesbury on a rain-affected track. Fitter now and has the class to handle the rise in grade.

selections.name: Helldeeva
selections.reason: Heavy track winner at Warwick Farm two starts back. Disappointed last start but is highly capable under these conditions.

selections.name: Forest King
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed plenty of ability in his first preparation, including a debut win on a rain-affected track.

danger_horse.name: Gatineau
danger_horse.reason: Solid debut behind Omolong at this track. Tommy Berry stays on and he should improve with racing experience.

selections.name: Koios
selections.reason: Heavy track specialist who won a Bm82 at Taree on heavy ground two starts back. Zac Lloyd takes the ride and he maps beautifully.

selections.name: Myriad
selections.reason: Solid third at this track last start over 6f. Tommy Berry booked and he handles rain-affected ground well.

selections.name: Embrace The Wind
selections.reason: Fitter second-up. Ran a solid race first-up and has previously won second-up on a rain-affected track.

selections.name: Harlex
selections.reason: Consistent performer who handles rain-affected tracks well. Rachel King rides and he should be competitive despite the wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Rolling Magic (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Has an excellent fresh record and has trialled well leading into this assignment.

selections.name: Dividends Paid
selections.reason: Unbeaten in two career starts. Trialled exceptionally well on heavy ground recently and gets a perfect map from barrier 2.

selections.name: Dawn On Me
selections.reason: Dominant last-start winner at Sapphire Coast by 3.5 lengths on a rain-affected track. Inside gate is a massive advantage.

selections.name: Sneaky Pee Cee
selections.reason: Heavy track winner dropping back to Highway class. Ran a solid race in Bm78 company last start.

selections.name: Satin Stiletto
selections.reason: Class runner who will appreciate the drop in grade to Highway company. Disappointed first-up but capable of bouncing back.

danger_horse.name: Kakoda
danger_horse.reason: Flying in the country, including a close second last start at Scone. Handles wet tracks well.

selections.name: Ballpark
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after a dominant win on heavy ground at Randwick Kensington last start. Nash Rawiller stays on.

selections.name: Cheval De Bois (NZ)
selections.reason: Just missed behind Ballpark last start. Meets him better at the weights with the claim and handles heavy ground.

selections.name: Attractiveness (NZ)
selections.reason: Solid third at this track last start. Won well at Newcastle on soft ground before that and handles wet tracks.

selections.name: Viva Mauricio
selections.reason: Impressive first-up maiden winner at Hawkesbury on soft ground. Drawn to get a soft run from the inside gate.

danger_horse.name: Arapawa
danger_horse.reason: Strong winner at Scone last start. Progressive type who handles rain-affected tracks well.

selections.name: Cormac T (GB)
selections.reason: Excellent second last start at this track over 1.25m. Handles wet conditions well and is ready for the 1.5m trip.

selections.name: Le Troisir (NZ)
selections.reason: Racing in great form, including a win at Warwick Farm on soft ground two starts back. Handles wet tracks well.

selections.name: Sounds Unusual (NZ)
selections.reason: Forgive last start. Heavy track winner who will appreciate the grueling test of stamina on a Heavy 9.

selections.name: Masoun (FR)
selections.reason: Nash Rawiller takes the ride. Solid third last start in Bm90 company at this track and handles wet tracks.

danger_horse.name: Golden Century (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Peak fitness now. Tommy Berry rides and he is capable of showing sharp improvement on wet ground.

selections.name: Sword Of Legacy
selections.reason: Highly progressive filly who won well in Queensland last start. Nash Rawiller booked and she handles wet ground.

selections.name: Ticklebelly
selections.reason: Consistent mare who ran a close second last start at this track. Handles rain-affected ground perfectly.

selections.name: West Of Dalby
selections.reason: Excellent second last start at this track. Maps nicely from barrier 3 and handles wet ground.

selections.name: Jellicious
selections.reason: Tommy Berry rides. Solid fourth last start and finds an easier assignment here on wet ground.

danger_horse.name: Tequila Baby
danger_horse.reason: Good second at Warwick Farm last start. Handles heavy track conditions and is well-weighted.

selections.name: Roselyn's Star
selections.reason: High-class sprinter resuming. Won a G3 over 6f last prep and has trialled exceptionally well leading into this.

selections.name: Way To The Stars
selections.reason: Speedy customer drawn the rail. Trial winner who handles rain-affected tracks well and has an excellent fresh record.

selections.name: Aviatress
selections.reason: Quality mare resuming. Excellent fresh record and Tommy Berry rides. Handles rain-affected ground.

selections.name: Cigar Flick
selections.reason: Honest mare who handles heavy tracks well. Drawn to get a soft run and will be hitting the line hard.

danger_horse.name: Storm The Ramparts
danger_horse.reason: Drops in weight and is capable of running a bold race fresh. Handles wet tracks well.

selections.name: Dark Glitter
selections.reason: Dominant last-start winner at this track on soft ground. Heavy track winner who is in career-best form.

selections.name: Midnight Opal
selections.reason: Solid third behind Dark Glitter last start. Handles wet tracks well and Dylan Gibbons rides.

selections.name: Elouyou
selections.reason: Victorian visitor in good form, including a heavy track placing. Tommy Berry booked and handles wet ground.

selections.name: Romeo's Choice
selections.reason: Consistent Bm88 performer who handles wet tracks well. Claim helps and maps nicely.

danger_horse.name: Ready To Shine (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Last-start winner at this track on soft ground. Drawn well and is highly progressive.

selections.name: Midnight Dynamite
selections.reason: Outstanding winter form, including a win in the LR Civic Stakes. Handles heavy track conditions perfectly and Tommy Berry rides.

selections.name: General Salute
selections.reason: Won the LR Winter Stakes last start at this track. Nash Rawiller stays on and he handles wet ground well.

selections.name: Mchale
selections.reason: Excellent second behind General Salute last start. Handles rain-affected tracks well and is well-weighted.

selections.name: War Eternal (NZ)
selections.reason: Racing in superb form in Queensland, including a LR win on heavy ground. Rachel King rides.

danger_horse.name: Whinchat
danger_horse.reason: Honest front-runner who handles heavy ground. Will lead and give a massive sight.

selections.name: Columbia Blue
selections.reason: Excellent second last start at this track over 5.5f. Handles wet ground well and Nash Rawiller is booked.

selections.name: Snack Bar
selections.reason: Good third last start behind Ready To Shine. Drawn perfectly in barrier 2 and handles rain-affected ground.

selections.name: Silencio Porfavor
selections.reason: Impressive last-start winner at Newcastle on soft ground. Handles wet tracks well and Zac Lloyd rides.

selections.name: Stardeel
selections.reason: Forgive last start. Heavy track winner at this course previously and is capable of showing sharp improvement.

danger_horse.name: Kreon
danger_horse.reason: Solid third last start at this track. Handles wet ground well and Anna Roper rides.
